# FileFormat Comprehensive Requirements Document
## AI-Consumable Specifications for Snowflake FileFormat Object Snapshot/Diff Implementation

**Generated By**: Enhanced AIPL Program  
**Object Type**: FileFormat  
**Database**: Snowflake  
**Documentation Standard**: AI_CONTENT_RULES_BASIC.yaml compatible  

## OBJECT_OVERVIEW
```yaml
PURPOSE: "FileFormat objects define how Snowflake interprets data files during loading/unloading operations"
BUSINESS_VALUE: "Essential for data ingestion pipelines, ETL processes, and data lake integrations"
DATABASE_CONTEXT: "Named database objects that encapsulate file parsing rules and format specifications"
SQL_OBJECT_TYPE: "FILE FORMAT"
MANAGEMENT_COMMANDS: ["CREATE FILE FORMAT", "ALTER FILE FORMAT", "DROP FILE FORMAT", "SHOW FILE FORMATS"]
```

## PROPERTY_ANALYSIS_TABLE
| Property | Type | Required | Default | Comparison | Category | Notes |
|----------|------|----------|---------|------------|----------|-------|
| FILE_FORMAT_NAME | String | Yes | - | Full | Identity | Object identifier |
| FILE_FORMAT_CATALOG | String | Yes | - | Full | Identity | Database name |
| FILE_FORMAT_SCHEMA | String | Yes | - | Full | Identity | Schema name |
| FILE_FORMAT_OWNER | String | No | Current Role | Exclude | State | System-managed ownership |
| FILE_FORMAT_TYPE | String | Yes | CSV | Full | Configuration | Format type: CSV, JSON, AVRO, ORC, PARQUET, XML |
| RECORD_DELIMITER | String | No | \n | Full | Configuration | Character separating records |
| FIELD_DELIMITER | String | No | , | Full | Configuration | Character separating fields |
| SKIP_HEADER | Number | No | 0 | Full | Configuration | Number of header lines to skip |
| DATE_FORMAT | String | No | AUTO | Full | Configuration | Date parsing format |
| TIME_FORMAT | String | No | AUTO | Full | Configuration | Time parsing format |
| TIMESTAMP_FORMAT | String | No | AUTO | Full | Configuration | Timestamp parsing format |
| BINARY_FORMAT | String | No | HEX | Full | Configuration | Binary data representation |
| ESCAPE | String | No | NONE | Full | Configuration | Escape character for field values |
| ESCAPE_UNENCLOSED_FIELD | String | No | \ | Full | Configuration | Escape character for unenclosed fields |
| TRIM_SPACE | Boolean | No | FALSE | Full | Configuration | Remove leading/trailing whitespace |
| FIELD_OPTIONALLY_ENCLOSED_BY | String | No | NONE | Full | Configuration | Character for optional field enclosure |
| NULL_IF | Array | No | ["\\N"] | Full | Configuration | Strings converted to NULL |
| COMPRESSION | String | No | AUTO | Full | Configuration | Compression algorithm: AUTO, GZIP, BZ2, BROTLI, ZSTD, DEFLATE, RAW_DEFLATE |
| ERROR_ON_COLUMN_COUNT_MISMATCH | Boolean | No | TRUE | Full | Configuration | Generate error on column count mismatch |
| VALIDATE_UTF8 | Boolean | No | TRUE | Full | Configuration | Validate UTF-8 encoding |
| SKIP_BLANK_LINES | Boolean | No | FALSE | Full | Configuration | Skip empty lines |
| REPLACE_INVALID_CHARACTERS | Boolean | No | FALSE | Full | Configuration | Replace invalid UTF-8 characters |
| EMPTY_FIELD_AS_NULL | Boolean | No | TRUE | Full | Configuration | Treat empty fields as NULL |
| SKIP_BYTE_ORDER_MARK | Boolean | No | TRUE | Full | Configuration | Skip BOM if present |
| ENCODING | String | No | UTF8 | Full | Configuration | Character encoding |
| MULTI_LINE | Boolean | No | TRUE | Full | Configuration | Allow multi-line records |
| PARSE_HEADER | Boolean | No | FALSE | Full | Configuration | Parse header to infer column names |
| FILE_EXTENSION | String | No | NULL | Full | Configuration | Default file extension |
| CREATED | Timestamp | No | CURRENT_TIME | Exclude | State | Creation timestamp |
| LAST_ALTERED | Timestamp | No | CURRENT_TIME | Exclude | State | Last modification timestamp |
| COMMENT | String | No | NULL | Exclude if both null | Configuration | User description |

## PROPERTY_CATEGORIZATION
```yaml
IDENTITY_PROPERTIES:
  - FILE_FORMAT_NAME: "Primary identifier for object equality"
  - FILE_FORMAT_CATALOG: "Database scope for uniqueness"
  - FILE_FORMAT_SCHEMA: "Schema scope for uniqueness"
  PURPOSE: "Used in equals/hashCode, determines object identity"
  
CONFIGURATION_PROPERTIES:
  CSV_SPECIFIC:
    - RECORD_DELIMITER: "Record separation character"
    - FIELD_DELIMITER: "Field separation character"  
    - SKIP_HEADER: "Header lines to skip"
    - ESCAPE: "Escape character for enclosed fields"
    - ESCAPE_UNENCLOSED_FIELD: "Escape character for unenclosed fields"
    - FIELD_OPTIONALLY_ENCLOSED_BY: "Optional field enclosure character"
    - MULTI_LINE: "Allow records spanning multiple lines"
    - PARSE_HEADER: "Parse header to infer column names"
  COMMON_PROPERTIES:
    - FILE_FORMAT_TYPE: "Format type specification"
    - COMPRESSION: "Compression algorithm"
    - TRIM_SPACE: "Whitespace handling"
    - NULL_IF: "NULL value conversion strings"
    - ERROR_ON_COLUMN_COUNT_MISMATCH: "Error handling behavior"
    - VALIDATE_UTF8: "UTF-8 validation"
    - SKIP_BLANK_LINES: "Empty line handling"
    - REPLACE_INVALID_CHARACTERS: "Invalid character handling"
    - EMPTY_FIELD_AS_NULL: "Empty field treatment"
    - SKIP_BYTE_ORDER_MARK: "BOM handling"
    - ENCODING: "Character encoding"
    - FILE_EXTENSION: "Default file extension"
  FORMAT_PROPERTIES:
    - DATE_FORMAT: "Date parsing specification"
    - TIME_FORMAT: "Time parsing specification"
    - TIMESTAMP_FORMAT: "Timestamp parsing specification"
    - BINARY_FORMAT: "Binary data representation"
  USER_METADATA:
    - COMMENT: "User-provided description"
  PURPOSE: "User-configurable properties compared during diff operations"
  
STATE_PROPERTIES:
  - FILE_FORMAT_OWNER: "System-managed ownership"
  - CREATED: "Creation timestamp"
  - LAST_ALTERED: "Modification timestamp"
  PURPOSE: "System-managed, excluded from comparison"
```

## SQL_QUERY_SPECIFICATIONS
```yaml
BASE_QUERY: |
  SELECT 
      FILE_FORMAT_CATALOG,
      FILE_FORMAT_SCHEMA,
      FILE_FORMAT_NAME,
      FILE_FORMAT_OWNER,
      FILE_FORMAT_TYPE,
      RECORD_DELIMITER,
      FIELD_DELIMITER,
      SKIP_HEADER,
      DATE_FORMAT,
      TIME_FORMAT,
      TIMESTAMP_FORMAT,
      BINARY_FORMAT,
      ESCAPE,
      ESCAPE_UNENCLOSED_FIELD,
      TRIM_SPACE,
      FIELD_OPTIONALLY_ENCLOSED_BY,
      NULL_IF,
      COMPRESSION,
      ERROR_ON_COLUMN_COUNT_MISMATCH,
      CREATED,
      LAST_ALTERED,
      COMMENT
  FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.FILE_FORMATS
  WHERE FILE_FORMAT_CATALOG = ?
  AND FILE_FORMAT_SCHEMA = ?
  ORDER BY FILE_FORMAT_NAME

SPECIFIC_OBJECT_QUERY: |
  SELECT 
      FILE_FORMAT_CATALOG,
      FILE_FORMAT_SCHEMA,
      FILE_FORMAT_NAME,
      FILE_FORMAT_OWNER,
      FILE_FORMAT_TYPE,
      RECORD_DELIMITER,
      FIELD_DELIMITER,
      SKIP_HEADER,
      DATE_FORMAT,
      TIME_FORMAT,
      TIMESTAMP_FORMAT,
      BINARY_FORMAT,
      ESCAPE,
      ESCAPE_UNENCLOSED_FIELD,
      TRIM_SPACE,
      FIELD_OPTIONALLY_ENCLOSED_BY,
      NULL_IF,
      COMPRESSION,
      ERROR_ON_COLUMN_COUNT_MISMATCH,
      CREATED,
      LAST_ALTERED,
      COMMENT
  FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.FILE_FORMATS
  WHERE FILE_FORMAT_CATALOG = ?
  AND FILE_FORMAT_SCHEMA = ?
  AND FILE_FORMAT_NAME = ?

PARAMETER_MAPPING:
  PARAM_1: "Catalog name (database name)"
  PARAM_2: "Schema name"
  PARAM_3: "File format name (for specific object query)"

RESULT_SET_MAPPING:
  FILE_FORMAT_CATALOG: "setDatabaseName(rs.getString('FILE_FORMAT_CATALOG'))"
  FILE_FORMAT_SCHEMA: "setSchemaName(rs.getString('FILE_FORMAT_SCHEMA'))"
  FILE_FORMAT_NAME: "setName(rs.getString('FILE_FORMAT_NAME'))"
  FILE_FORMAT_TYPE: "setType(rs.getString('FILE_FORMAT_TYPE'))"
  COMPRESSION: "setCompression(rs.getString('COMPRESSION'))"
  RECORD_DELIMITER: "setRecordDelimiter(rs.getString('RECORD_DELIMITER'))"
  FIELD_DELIMITER: "setFieldDelimiter(rs.getString('FIELD_DELIMITER'))"
  SKIP_HEADER: "setSkipHeader(rs.getInt('SKIP_HEADER'))"
  TRIM_SPACE: "setTrimSpace(rs.getBoolean('TRIM_SPACE'))"
  ERROR_ON_COLUMN_COUNT_MISMATCH: "setErrorOnColumnCountMismatch(rs.getBoolean('ERROR_ON_COLUMN_COUNT_MISMATCH'))"
  COMMENT: "setComment(rs.getString('COMMENT'))"

NULL_HANDLING:
  RECORD_DELIMITER: "Handle as literal string, preserve newline characters"
  NULL_IF: "Parse JSON array format: '[\"\\\\N\"]'"
  COMMENT: "CASE WHEN COMMENT IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE COMMENT END"
  NUMERIC_VALUES: "Handle NULL as default values per Snowflake documentation"
```

## COMPARISON_LOGIC_REQUIREMENTS
```yaml
OBJECT_IDENTITY_LOGIC:
  SAME_OBJECT_CRITERIA:
    - "FILE_FORMAT_NAME must match (case-sensitive)"
    - "FILE_FORMAT_CATALOG must match"
    - "FILE_FORMAT_SCHEMA must match"
  HASH_CALCULATION: "Objects.hash(name, catalogName, schemaName)"
  
PROPERTY_COMPARISON_RULES:
  COMPARE_ALWAYS:
    - FILE_FORMAT_TYPE
    - COMPRESSION
    - RECORD_DELIMITER
    - FIELD_DELIMITER
    - SKIP_HEADER
    - TRIM_SPACE
    - ERROR_ON_COLUMN_COUNT_MISMATCH
    
  COMPARE_WHEN_NOT_DEFAULT:
    - DATE_FORMAT: "Compare when not 'AUTO'"
    - TIME_FORMAT: "Compare when not 'AUTO'"
    - TIMESTAMP_FORMAT: "Compare when not 'AUTO'"
    - BINARY_FORMAT: "Compare when not 'HEX'"
    - ESCAPE: "Compare when not 'NONE'"
    - FIELD_OPTIONALLY_ENCLOSED_BY: "Compare when not 'NONE'"
    
  COMPARE_WHEN_PRESENT:
    - COMMENT: "Compare only when both objects have non-null comments"
    - NULL_IF: "Compare array contents, order-independent"
    
  EXCLUDE_FROM_COMPARISON:
    - FILE_FORMAT_OWNER: "System-managed, varies by execution context"
    - CREATED: "Creation timestamp, never changes"
    - LAST_ALTERED: "Modification timestamp, system-managed"

EDGE_CASES:
  NULL_HANDLING:
    - "NULL COMMENT vs empty string: treat as different"
    - "NULL_IF array comparison: parse JSON and compare contents"
    - "Default value handling: NULL fields use Snowflake defaults"
  CASE_SENSITIVITY:
    - "Object names: case-sensitive comparison"
    - "String values: preserve case as stored in database"
  SPECIAL_CHARACTERS:
    - "RECORD_DELIMITER: handle escaped characters (\\n, \\r, \\t)"
    - "FIELD_DELIMITER: handle special characters and escape sequences"
```

## SYSTEMATIC_TEST_SCENARIOS
```yaml
POSITIVE_TESTING:
  BASIC_OBJECT_CREATION:
    - "Create FileFormat with minimal required properties"
    - "Create FileFormat with all CSV-specific properties"
    - "Create FileFormat with compression options"
  SNAPSHOT_RETRIEVAL:
    - "Successfully retrieve existing FileFormat from database"
    - "Handle FileFormat with all property variations"
    - "Query FileFormat with special characters in name"
  PROPERTY_MAPPING:
    - "Verify all INFORMATION_SCHEMA columns map to object properties"
    - "Validate data type conversions (String to Boolean, Number)"

NEGATIVE_TESTING:
  INVALID_INPUTS:
    - "Handle non-existent FileFormat gracefully (return null)"
    - "Handle database connection failures"
    - "Handle malformed SQL results"
  ERROR_CONDITIONS:
    - "Missing required database/schema parameters"
    - "Invalid FileFormat name characters"
    - "Insufficient database permissions"

BOUNDARY_VALUE_ANALYSIS:
  NULL_VALUES:
    - "FileFormat with null optional properties"
    - "Empty string vs null comparison"
    - "Zero vs null numeric values"
  EXTREME_VALUES:
    - "Maximum length FileFormat names"
    - "Special characters in delimiters"
    - "Large SKIP_HEADER values"
  DATA_TYPE_LIMITS:
    - "Boolean property edge cases (true/false/null)"
    - "Numeric boundary values for SKIP_HEADER"

EDGE_CASES:
  CASE_SENSITIVITY:
    - "FileFormat names with mixed case"
    - "Schema/catalog name case variations"
  SPECIAL_CHARACTERS:
    - "FileFormat names with spaces, quotes, special chars"
    - "Delimiters with escape sequences"
    - "Unicode characters in comments"
  DEFAULT_HANDLING:
    - "Properties with Snowflake default values"
    - "Implicit vs explicit defaults"

INTEGRATION_SCENARIOS:
  MOCK_DATABASE:
    - "Unit tests with mocked JDBC connections"
    - "Simulated result sets with various data combinations"
  LIGHTWEIGHT_INTEGRATION:
    - "H2 database integration with similar schema"  
    - "Validate SQL query syntax and parameter binding"
  FULL_SNOWFLAKE_VALIDATION:
    - "End-to-end testing with real Snowflake database"
    - "Performance testing with large result sets"
    - "Network timeout and retry scenarios"
```

## FRAMEWORK_INTEGRATION_REQUIREMENTS
```yaml
SERVICE_REGISTRATION:
  SNAPSHOT_GENERATOR:
    FILE: "META-INF/services/liquibase.snapshot.SnapshotGenerator"
    ENTRY: "liquibase.snapshot.jvm.FileFormatSnapshotGeneratorSnowflake"
  DIFF_COMPARATOR:
    FILE: "META-INF/services/liquibase.diff.compare.DatabaseObjectComparator"
    ENTRY: "liquibase.diff.output.FileFormatComparator"
    
LIQUIBASE_INTEGRATION:
  PRIORITY_HANDLING:
    - "SnapshotGenerator: PRIORITY_DATABASE for SnowflakeDatabase"
    - "Comparator: PRIORITY_TYPE for FileFormat objects"
  FRAMEWORK_COMPLIANCE:
    - "Extend JdbcSnapshotGenerator"
    - "Implement DatabaseObjectComparator interface"
    - "Follow Liquibase naming conventions"

VALIDATION_COMMANDS:
  SERVICE_REGISTRATION_CHECK: "grep -r 'FileFormatSnapshotGeneratorSnowflake' src/main/resources/META-INF/services/"
  COMPILATION_VALIDATION: "mvn compile -q"
  UNIT_TEST_EXECUTION: "mvn test -Dtest='*FileFormat*Test*' -q"
```
